title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: What's up guys! I'm now studying abroad through UNCW. If you're interested in how this works, study abroad is AMAZING.. Check it out: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C-dfWaNOJHQ&t=566s
author: @StephenNymberg

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: Man I love your outgoing personality I’ve improved lots compared to how quiet I used to be still a ways to go, everything about you man, work ethic always positive appreciate the vids teach me your ways
author: @keltonderkach9601

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: I was about to go to some teeny tiny school in the middle of nowhere in the mountains BUT I DECIDED ON UNCW LAST MINUTE AND I COULD NOT BE MORE EXCITED
author: @Katechap20

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: I received my admissions decision for this school 2 days ago and I got in! I could not be more excited to join the Seahawk family! Awesome video by the way, very helpful.
author: @chlooo1258

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: I have lived in Wilmington my entire life and it is honestly just like this in summer. And my dad works at UNCW my mom went there and my brother is currently going there also my sister wants to go. It’s an amazing school and I want to study marine biology and UNCW has one of the best marine biology programs in the world. I can’t wait to be a student of this small positive school that I’ve been visiting since I was little
author: @maryclairestuart5383

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: I am currently waiting on a decision from UNCW! I’m almost half way through my senior year of high school! watching this video helped reassure me of my decision to go there. The people seem great and I love the positive community!
author: @aimeeesther6563

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A UNCW STUDENT - Finals Week
body: We love your video's it's not a Netflix  and chill night it's a Stephen nymberg night at our house when u post

title: a typical day in my life at college (very busy) // uncw
body: I live in a small time like 30 minutes outside of Wilmington so sometimes I forget people actually live here and we have a university. I had to do a retake when I saw UNCW because most people don't really bother with the eastern NC unless it's the Outer Banks.

title: Touring Every North Carolina College So You Don't Have To | (Duke, UNC, NC State, Etc.)
body: You only toured ONE of NC State's campus'. NC State is way bigger than just main campus. Not to mention we have a beautiful park right next to east side of main campus. The ratings are somewhat good except that I'd put NC State higher if toured completely.
